20 Jahre Berufserfahrung · seit 2012 im: 20 Years of Professional Experience · on the Team since 2012
2021 eröffnete er seine Wahlarztpraxis i: In 2021, he opened his private practice in the heart of Vienna. The decision was deliberate: „In the hospital, I had 8 minutes per patient. That’s not enough for me. I want to truly get to know people, understand their story – not just their lab results.“
30–45 Minuten. Ich nehme mir die Zeit, I: 30–45 minutes. I take the time to thoroughly assess your skin condition and develop an individual treatment plan.
8 Jahre Unfallchirurgie im Krankenhaus h: 8 years of trauma surgery in hospital taught Dr. Stefan Hofer what truly matters: not every problem needs surgical intervention. Since establishing his own practice, he has dedicated himself to conservative therapy concepts. He works closely with physiotherapists and has a profound passion for sports medicine. As an avid runner, he understands athletes first-hand – their impatience as well as their desire to get back in shape quickly.
Ab 9 Jahren empfohlen. Kostenlos im Schu: Recommended from age 9. Free of charge in the school programme from age 12.
Ab welchem Alter nehmen Sie Kinder an?: From what age do you accept children?
Alle Impfungen des österreichischen Grat: All vaccinations in the Austrian free school vaccination programme are free of charge – including MMR, varicella, HPV, hepatitis A & B and more. Please ask us about the current status at your appointment.
Alle niedergelassenen Ärztinnen und Ärzt: All physicians in private practice with their own office qualify as SMEs and are generally eligible for funding – regardless of specialty. Public health insurance doctors, private doctors, group practices – all of them. Hospitals and purely employed doctors without their own practice are not eligible.
Allergologische Diagnostik am neuesten S: State-of-the-art allergy diagnostics: a structured approach from medical history through skin tests to specific immunotherapy (desensitisation).
Als aktive Triathletin weiß Dr. Vogt, wi: As an active triathlete, Dr. Vogt knows how frustrating injuries can be. Her conservative treatment concepts help patients stay active quickly and sustainably. „Often, exercise is the best medicine – if you know how.“
Auf Wunsch integrieren wir gängige Buchu: On request, we integrate common booking systems such as Doctolib, Samedi or a custom solution directly into your website. Patients can then request or book appointments around the clock – without a phone call. This noticeably reduces routine calls and increases patient satisfaction.
Besonders empfohlen für Kinder mit chron: Especially recommended for children with chronic conditions, but beneficial for everyone.
Bieten Sie auch Hausbesuche an?: Do you also offer house calls?
Bitte bringen Sie den Mutter-Kind-Pass o: Please bring the Mother-Child Passport or vaccination booklet. At the first appointment, we will get to know each other at ease.
Bitte rufen Sie morgens zwischen 8:00 un: Please call in the morning between 8:00 and 9:00. We reserve daily acute appointments for sick children.
Botox hält 3–6 Monate, Hyaluron-Filler 6: Botox lasts 3–6 months, hyaluronic acid fillers 6–18 months. We discuss realistic expectations during the initial consultation.
Christina hält alle Fäden zusammen. Sie: Christina holds everything together. She coordinates collaboration between the four practices, trains new staff members and is the contact person for organisational matters. „A centre only works when the backbone is solid,“ she says.

Christina holds everything together. She coordinates collaboration between the four practices, trains new staff members, manages patient correspondence and is the contact person for all organisational matters. Without her, the medical centre would not function as it does. „A centre stands or falls with its administration. Quality begins on the phone.“
Die Europäische Kommission stellt eine P: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
Die inhaltliche Verantwortung liegt beim: Content responsibility lies with the respective doctor as the operator of the website. We create the texts together and submit them for approval – you review the medical information. You are listed as the operator in the legal notice.
Die Praxis-Website ist Ihr professionell: The practice website is your professional online presence (up to 5 pages, office hours, services, contact). Digital positioning goes far beyond that: full AI readiness, structured data (Schema Markup), llms.txt, in-depth research on your specialty and region, up to 10 pages incl. FAQ system. In short: website = being visible. Positioning = being recommended by AI.
Die Preise richten sich nach dem individ: Prices depend on the individual scope of services and are available on request. We offer packages for individual practices as well as tailored solutions for medical centres and primary care units – contact us for a personalised quote.
Die Österreichische Ärztekammer hat klar: The Austrian Medical Chamber has clear guidelines on advertising for doctors: no comparisons with competitors, no sensational advertising, factual communication. We know these guidelines and write all content accordingly. Our clients have had no objections to date.
Digitale Dermatoskopie ermöglicht die Do: Digital dermoscopy enables documentation and comparison of each individual mole over time. Changes are detected early.
DocFinder und Herold sind Portale – Sie: DocFinder and Herold are directories – you are listed there as an entry, but have no control over presentation, content or ranking. Your own website gives you full control: your own brand, your own texts, your own AI optimisation. Directories can change your listing or charge fees – your own domain always remains yours.
Dr. Claudia Nowak ist Spezialistin für k: Dr. Claudia Nowak specialises in complex internal medicine conditions and is one of the most sought-after internists in the 6th district. She combines precise diagnostics with an attentive ear – two qualities that are equally indispensable in internal medicine. She has a particular passion for cardiology and gastroenterology. She is known for not merely commenting on lab results, but explaining them – so that patients truly understand what is happening in their body.
Dr. Eder leitet die Neurologie-Ambulanz: Dr. Eder heads the neurology outpatient clinic and specialises in multiple sclerosis and epilepsy. He is known for his calm, structured manner – even with difficult diagnoses, he maintains an overview and explains everything clearly.
Dr. Eva Zimmermann begleitet Frauen in a: Dr. Eva Zimmermann accompanies women through all stages of life – from the first check-up during puberty through pregnancy and birth to menopause counselling. Her particular concern is respectful, informed decision-making: women should understand their options and be able to decide for themselves – without pressure. She worked at the AKH Vienna for several years and is also actively involved in training young gynaecologists.
Dr. Fürst ist der klassische Hausarzt, d: Dr. Fürst is the quintessential family doctor who has accompanied his patients for decades. He knows family histories, life circumstances and medical records like no other. His motto: „Listening is half the diagnosis.“
Dr. Hartmann ist die medizinische Leiter: Dr. Hartmann is the medical director of the MedCenter. With 18 years of experience in internal medicine, she is the first point of contact for complex internal medicine cases at the centre. Her heart truly beats for cardiology – and for her patients.
Dr. Hofer war 8 Jahre als Unfallchirurg: Dr. Hofer worked as a trauma surgeon at a hospital for 8 years before deciding to establish his own practice. He treats sports injuries, postural problems and degenerative conditions – conservatively, whenever possible.
Dr. Michael Fürst ist seit 2006 als nied: Dr. Michael Fürst has been practising as a general practitioner since 2006, the last 10 years of which at the Ärztezentrum Mariahilf. As a classic family doctor, he cares for entire families – often across generations. His approach is holistic: he sees pathological findings not merely as numbers, but in the context of his patients’ entire lives. Dr. Fürst is also committed to preventive medicine and regularly lectures on lifestyle and chronic diseases.
Dr. Nowak ist Spezialistin für komplexe: Dr. Nowak specialises in complex internal medicine questions. She combines precise diagnostics with an attentive ear – and has a particular passion for cardiac and gastrointestinal conditions.
Dr. Pichler ist der Allgemeinmediziner i: Dr. Pichler is the general practitioner at the MedCenter – and usually the first doctor patients see. He supports families, coordinates referrals to specialists and ensures no case falls through the cracks.
Dr. Zimmermann begleitet Frauen in allen: Dr. Zimmermann accompanies women through all stages of life – from preventive care to hormone counselling during menopause. She places great value on respectful, informed decision-making.
Ein KI-Telefonassistent beantwortet eing: An AI telephone assistant answers incoming calls automatically – in natural Austrian German. It provides information about office hours, takes appointment requests and noticeably relieves your team of routine enquiries. Ideal for peak times and holiday periods.
Eine strukturierte Datei auf Ihrer Websi: A structured file on your website that AI crawlers (LLM bots) specifically read – similar to robots.txt for search engines, but designed for AI systems. It contains a machine-optimised summary of your practice, specialty and services.

For classic Google SEO: perhaps. Those who start earlier have a head start – it’s real, but can be caught up. For AI visibility: no. Ja – jeder niedergelassene Arzt ist ein: Yes – every practising physician is an independent business and can apply for funding individually. In a medical centre with 16 doctors, up to 16 separate funding applications can be submitted. We coordinate this centrally on request.
Ja – und das ist messbar. Ordinationen m: Yes – and it’s measurable. Ja, sehr gerne. Wir empfehlen ab 30 Jahr: Yes, absolutely. We recommend an annual skin check from age 30 – even without a specific concern.
Ja. Ab 2025 gilt das EU-weite Barrierefr: Yes. From 2025, the EU-wide European Accessibility Act also applies to many business websites. Ja. Kombinationsimpfstoffe wie der 6-fac: Yes. Combination vaccines such as the 6-in-1 vaccine were specifically developed for this purpose. A child’s immune system can easily process multiple antigens at the same time.
